title: Evaluating the clinical relevance of the enterotypes in the Estonian microbiome cohort.
author: Aasmets O Krigul KL Org E
content: S-EPMC9428584 PMC9428584 Evaluating the clinical relevance of the enterotypes in the Estonian microbiome cohort.
